Simulator Details
Flight Information
Time
Format HHMM in UTC (e.g. 1235 = 12:35Z). Actual times only — never the scheduled time. iCal feeds publish the schedule, not actual block-off / block-on. To populate actuals automatically, import your monthly PDF roster — most operators include real ATD/ATA in the PDF.

Settings

Profile · Sync · Privacy · Data

Profile

P
Pilot
First Officer
Pilot type
Airline 705
Air carrier ops · All TC columns
Private / CPL
PPL / recreational · Simplified form
Student / CPL
Flight training · Dual & solo focus
Instructor / CFI
Dual given · ATPL credit focus
Helicopter
Rotorcraft ops · recent experience
Pilot identity
Name, rank, airline, and licence details. These appear on every PDF export.
Renew on the recurring cycle that applies to your multi-pilot 705 operation. Update this date after each PPC. For how training events (LOFT, IPC, etc.) relate to your PPC currency, refer to your operator's approved training program.
Operational preferences
How Cumulo behaves when it imports flights or recognizes flight numbers.
Comma-separated airline IATA codes. Cumulo recognizes flights matching these prefixes when syncing iCal / PDF rosters. The Airline dropdown above auto-fills this for you.
Under 705 ops, virtually every flight terminates with an instrument approach. When this is on, iCal sync sets Approaches = 1 on each new flight, feeding the CAR 401.05 currency counter (6 approaches / 6 months). Auto-enabled when you select a 705 airline. Turn off for 704 / 703 / bush ops where flights are often VFR — enter approaches manually. Existing flights and your manual entries are never overwritten.
Check the configurations you fly. Used to filter aircraft type suggestions and currency tracking (TC requires separate currency for floats, skis, tailwheel per CAR 401.05).
Display preferences
How the logbook table looks on screen. PDF exports are unaffected — they always show all 38 TC columns.
Cleaner logbook view — any column where every flight shows 0 is hidden from the table. The PDF export for Transport Canada always keeps all 38 columns.
Electronic signature

Sign below. Your signature is saved locally and appears on PDF exports.

Privacy & Trust

Crew name privacy
Crew names are personal information under PIPEDA and Loi 25.
My personal logbook (this device)
Full names always kept.
ALWAYS ON
My private cloud backup (Canada)
Anonymized to initials by default; full names only if you enable the switch below.
YOUR CHOICE
Public or marketing surfaces
Always anonymized. Cannot be overridden.
NEVER
Not legal advice. Cumulo's reading of PIPEDA s.7 + Loi 25 art. 12 applied to a personal logbook under CAR 401.08.
Your data is yours
Your data lives on your device and works offline. You can optionally back it up to your private Canadian cloud to sync across your devices — and export, archive or migrate everything, anytime.
Export all my data
Download a full JSON copy of every flight, your profile, and your import audit log.
Delete my data + purge
Permanently delete every flight, your profile, and your sync history from this device. When Supabase sync is enabled, this will also wipe your cloud copy within 30 days. Cannot be undone — export a JSON backup first.
Why your data is safe
Hosted on Supabase ca-central-1 (Montréal). Encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256). Stored exclusively in Canada — subject to Canadian privacy law (PIPEDA + Loi 25).
Encrypted in transit + at rest
Stored in Montréal
We will never sell your data
Your data, your ownership — export anytime
Read the full security whitepaper →

Sync

Continuous auto-sync
This pane configures sources that fetch your roster automatically when you open Cumulo or refocus the tab. For one-shot file imports (PDF, CSV) use the Import page instead.
iCal roster auto-sync
Fetches your roster automatically — completed flights with real block hours. Re-syncs on app open and tab refocus.
If you can't find your iCal feed URL, check your airline's crew-scheduling portal — most publish a "subscribe to calendar" link in the roster section.
Cloud account
Cloud account not configured.

Data & Maintenance

Recovery
Reversible operations. Cumulo automatically snapshots your data before every bulk import or sync, so you can always go back.
Undo last bulk operation
Restores the snapshot taken before your most recent iCal sync, PDF import, or CSV import.
Restore from JSON backup
Load a previously exported backup file (from Privacy → Export). A preview opens before any data is overwritten.
Permanent actions
Cannot be undone. Export a JSON backup first if you're not sure.
Clear all flights
Permanently delete every flight from this device. Your profile and sync URL are kept.
